description: v0.1.3 — Retrieval BYOK/native semantic routing, Experiment D probes, smart-search resolver fixes, hook health for Native/BYOK.
changelog:
**Retrieval and hook reliability (unpublished aligned pair; core stayed 0.1.2 on disk — fixed in 0.1.4).**

- feat(retrieval): Cursor BYOK/native semantic routing, codegraph LSP guidance, Experiment D probes, adapter metadata.
- fix(smart-search): wrapper status detection, timeout handling, clearer npm CLI entrypoint paths.
- fix(hooks): hook health repairs for Native and Cursor++ BYOK; session-start and subagent hook sync.
- fix(templates): register `cursor_retrieval_probe` in template index.

Run `trellis update` in each project to sync `.trellis/scripts`, hooks, and rules.
notes: Backfilled manifest — v0.1.3 was bumped in-repo but never published as an aligned core/cli pair. Users on 0.1.2 should jump to 0.1.4.
